sado.Chinese:
名称：sado
功能：临时提升权限执行命令（类似sudo）
用法：sado <命令...>
示例：sado ls /root
说明：根据 /etc/sado.json 中的配置，临时将权限提升到指定的模式（low/mid/adv），执行完命令后自动恢复原权限。需要确认的规则会提示用户确认。
sado.English:
Name: sado
Function: Temporarily elevate permissions to execute a command (like sudo)
Usage: sado <command...>
Example: sado ls /root
Description: Based on the configuration in /etc/sado.json, temporarily elevate permissions to the specified mode (low/mid/adv), then restore after execution. Rules that require confirmation will prompt the user.
